items: When creating AppShrimp FastAPI sub-apps, generate __init__.py and main.py directly in the current working directory without browsing other app folders.
Implement personalized chatbots by creating a handle_chat function with FastAPI APIRouter in main.py, tailoring response style to specific user contexts like names or preferences.
Verify app creation by listing directory contents after writing files to ensure both required files exist with proper byte sizes.
Keep __init__.py minimal as a Python package marker while placing all application logic including the APIRouter and chat handlers in main.py.
For compliment or praise bots, generate warm, encouraging responses that reference specific user details to create highly personalized interactions.
